text: If a person is otherwise eligible to renew a vehicle registration under this chapter, the person may renew the vehicle registration through an online registration system maintained by the department.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 502. Registration of Vehicles
##### § 502.0435 — Online Registration Renewal

If a person is otherwise eligible to renew a vehicle registration under this chapter, the person may renew the vehicle registration through an online registration system maintained by the department.

*Added by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 207 (H.B.2152), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2021.*
